title: The Rainy Day
content:
It was raining outside, and Lin Yu was stuck inside the apartment with Su Xiaoxiao.

"This is so boring!" Su Xiaoxiao said, lying on the couch.

Lin Yu looked up from his book. "What do you want to do?"

Su Xiaoxiao sat up, her eyes bright. "Let's watch a movie!"

Lin Yu nodded. "Okay. What movie?"

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "A romantic comedy!"

Lin Yu groaned. "Not a romantic comedy."

Su Xiaoxiao pouted. "Please?"

Lin Yu hesitated, then nodded. "Fine."

***

They sat on the couch, watching a romantic comedy. Su Xiaoxiao laughed at all the jokes, and she even cried during the sad parts.

Lin Yu watched her, amused. She was so expressive, and he couldn't help but smile.

Halfway through the movie, Su Xiaoxiao fell asleep, leaning on Lin Yu's shoulder.

Lin Yu froze, his heart racing. He could feel her breath on his neck, and her hair was tickling his face.

He looked down at her, and he saw that she was sleeping peacefully. Her face was soft and cute, and he couldn't help but stare.

Lin Yu gently moved her head so that she was lying on the couch, and he covered her with a blanket.

He sat there for a moment, watching her sleep. He knew that he shouldn't feel this way about his roommate, but he couldn't help it.

He was falling for Su Xiaoxiao.

***

When Su Xiaoxiao woke up, the movie was over, and Lin Yu was sitting next to her, reading a book.

"Did I fall asleep?" Su Xiaoxiao asked, rubbing her eyes.

Lin Yu nodded. "Yeah. You were snoring."

Su Xiaoxiao blushed. "I was not!"

Lin Yu laughed. "Sure you were."

Su Xiaoxiao pouted. "Whatever."

She sat up, and she noticed that she was covered with a blanket.

"Did you cover me?"

Lin Yu nodded. "Yeah. You looked cold."

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "Thanks, Lin Yu."

She leaned over and kissed him on the cheek.

"Good night," she said, standing up.

Lin Yu sat there, his hand on his cheek, his heart racing.

He had never been kissed by a girl before, and he didn't know how to feel.

But he knew one thing - he wanted more.

And he was going to get it.
